content.en:
"There shouldn't be many Ancient Void Stones in the Ancient Bitter Sea, I'm afraid it will take a long time to give birth to a new batch of Ancient Void Stones!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he left the primeval bitter sea.

In fact, in this period of time, he has scrapped ten replica bodies, and this replica body is about to be scrapped.

Coming out of the Ancient Sea of Bitterness, after he transferred the Ancient Void Stone, he annihilated the replica body that was about to be scrapped.

At any time, he took all the primeval void stones to the Xuhuang Mountain.

......

Xuhuang Mountain.

Ye Tian came here again.

"Little guy, you're here again so soon, don't waste the opportunity to use the Void Emperor's Order!" the Lord of the Void Emperor reminded after seeing Ye Tian.

"Lord of the Void Emperor, I've found enough Ancient Void Stones!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a pile of primeval void stones appeared.

"So many primeval void stones!!"

The Lord of the Void Emperor was shocked.

It was the first time he had seen a Heavenly Ancestor bring so many Ancient Void Stones to hand over the mission.

"Lord of the Void Emperor, a total of 1,600 Ancient Void Stones!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I'll give you 16,000 drops of the finest primeval root marrow!"

The Lord of the Void Emperor.

Wow!!!!

16,000 drops of primeval root pulp fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"Sure enough, it's the top primeval root marrow!"

Ye Tian had also obtained the primeval root marrow before, but it was just an ordinary primeval root marrow, and it was not comparable to these primeval root marrow at all.

"Thank you, Lord of the Void Emperor!" Ye Tian put away the primeval root essence and said, "May I ask the Lord of the Void Emperor, do you have any other tasks?"

"Of course there is!" said the Lord of the Void Emperor, "For example, if you help me kill the Lord of the Ghost Crane, if you can do it, everything I have is yours!"

Lord of Oni Cranes!

Even if Ye Tian hadn't heard of it, he knew that this was a Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and maybe even the existence that killed the Lord of the Void Emperor.

Even the Lord of the Void Emperor was severely injured by the other party and fell, so he didn't look for death when he went to him now.

Therefore, it was impossible for him to take on this task.

"Lord of the Void Emperor, I can't complete this task, are there any other tasks?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Void Emperor nodded, "Naturally, there are other tasks, these task lists are given to you, if you complete them, come to me!"

Airplanes!!!!

Some task lists turned into a scroll and floated in front of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took the scroll and left here directly.

......

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian picked up this scroll and studied these tasks carefully.

"Kill a disciple in the Mixed Ruins Cave, every time you kill one, you can go to the reward with the corpse of the disciples in the Mixed Ruins Cave!"

"Collect a primordial flower!"

"Collect the Bloodtooth Dragonstone!"

Ye Tian looked at these tasks, and his face was full of doubts, and he didn't know the resources on them.

Besides, what kind of place is the Cave of Ruins, he has never heard of it.

"Maybe the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor knows!"

So, he went to find the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor.

"Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, do you know the Chaos Cave?" Ye Tian asked.

"The Mixed Ruins Cave, I seem to have heard of it!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor thought back for a moment and said, "Come to think of it, the Mixed Ruins Cave is actually not a force from our territorial sea boundary rift, but a force from a top boundary rift. That top boundary rift seems to be called the Hunhe Boundary Seam, and you must know this name from the Lord of the Void Emperor. At the beginning, the Lord of the Void Emperor went to the Hunhe Boundary Rift, and soon after he came out, he fell!"

"Is the powerhouse of the Hunhe Boundary Crack very strong?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The Hunhe Boundary Rift is very powerful!" the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said solemnly: "This Boundary Rift is somewhat similar to the structure of our territorial waters, and there are many powerful bone transformation realms in it, and there are even more like primordial-level geniuses. In terms of personality, the case of the Hunhe boundary rift should be higher than that of the territorial sea rift. Therefore, the creatures of our territorial sea boundary rift will not be suppressed when they enter the Hunhe boundary rift. On the contrary, the creatures in the Boundary Rift of the Hunhe River will suppress our cultivation when they enter the Boundary Crack of our territorial waters. "

"The creatures of the Hunhe Boundary Rift can still enter our territorial waters?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Naturally, it's okay!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said with emotion: "You probably haven't experienced this thing yet, the creatures of our territorial sea boundary rift can enter one boundary rift after another. For example, we can also enter the land of the Dragon Sea. But one day in the future, the creatures of the land of Longhai can also enter us. For example, the entrance to the crack that you saw entering the land of the dragon sea, we could see it last time, but the creatures of the land of the dragon sea couldn't see it. The next time, such a crack entrance will appear, and we won't see it, but when they see it, they can come in. "

"Wouldn't the forces of the Hunhe Boundary Crack break into our place and a big war break out?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, a big war has to break out!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor showed a hint of fear, "For example, the Ancient War is the Battle of the Boundary Gap! Otherwise, do you think it's because of the Ancient Golden Tree? It was just a small battle in the Ancient War." I remember the primeval times, when the three top boundary rift entrances appeared together, and they all led to us in one direction. A Bone Transformation Realm powerhouse from the three top realm seams descended, and a large number of primeval-level nine blood transformation realms descended. In that battle, the primeval race was the main force, and we cultivators were the auxiliaries. As a result, you see, the primeval race was beaten to the point of near extinction, and it also made us cultivators rise!"

"The truth of the Ancient War turned out to be this!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He didn't know this secret before, but now he knew this secret from the mouth of the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor.

"The Mixed Ruins Cave is the strength of the Hunhe River Boundary Crack, what kind of strength is it?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said: "I don't know much, it seems that there are three Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and the primeval-level geniuses are estimated to be more than ten, but at that time, the data of the primeval period, what is the situation now, I don't know, maybe it will be destroyed!"

"Thank you Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor for your advice!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Then he left.

Knowing that the forces of the top boundary rift could break into the territorial sea boundary rift, his pressure suddenly increased.

Maybe this kind of thing will happen soon, and at that time, he will not be strong enough, and I am afraid that he will not be able to protect the human race.

Therefore, he must improve his strength as soon as possible!

"Don't care about the mission of the Lord of the Void Emperor first, you have to refine those high-grade primeval root essences, refine your heart, if you can reach the extreme of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, you can impact the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the years that followed, he began to refine these high-grade primeval roots with all his might, refining his heart.
